        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true,

      },

        "ref": true,

        "ref": true,

      },

        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "CONFMUX3": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "firstbyte": 10,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Carrier Vxx_swlk_diag_2 Byte used to allow Immobiliser diagnosis": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Carrier Vxx_swlk_diag_3 Byte used to allow Immobiliser diagnosis": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "FLAGFAN": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "High speed engine fan delayed command": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Low speed engine fan delayed command": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Fan 2 activation request from agb": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Fan 1 activation request from agb": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Fan 2 activation request from ac": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Fan 1 activation request from ac": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Fan 1 activation request from water temperature or engine management": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Fan 2 activation request from water temperature or engine management": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "FLAGPRS": {
        "firstbyte": 18,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Air conditioning pressure detection. Stored in E2PROM": {
        "firstbyte": 18,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Air conditioning pressure sensor short circuit memorised failure": {
        "firstbyte": 18,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Air conditioning pressure sensor open circuit memorised failure": {
        "firstbyte": 18,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Air conditioning pressure sensor open circuit detected failure": {
        "firstbyte": 18,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Air conditioning pressure sensor short circuit detected failure": {
        "firstbyte": 18,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Relative air conditioning pressure for diagnosis": {
        "firstbyte": 19,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "FLGCRKI": {
        "firstbyte": 25,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "diesel Preheating done (diesel engine only)": {
        "firstbyte": 25,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "diesel Preheating lamp illumination command (diesel engine only)": {
        "firstbyte": 25,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Specific request Dmdspec": {
        "firstbyte": 25,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Status of starter Statudem": {
        "firstbyte": 25,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "FLGCRKO": {
        "firstbyte": 26,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "First start detected yet Firstdem": {
        "firstbyte": 26,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Starter fault Defdem": {
        "firstbyte": 26,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "ECM Cranking authorization Topecm": {
        "firstbyte": 26,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Engine status Etamotmx": {
        "firstbyte": 26,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "firstbyte": 29,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Engine speed": {
        "firstbyte": 27,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
